## Required Checklist

- [ ] updated all relevant documentation.
- [ ] updated or added tests for the changed behavior.
- [ ] extended and ran integration tests - [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md`.
- [ ] if the shared protocol or consumer-visible behavior changed, I opened or updated PRs in all relevant repos to keep MCP server/CLI parity.
